headline: A Look At Weyerhaeuser (WY) Valuation As Shares Trade Near Recent Levels
summary: Recent performance snapshot for Weyerhaeuser (WY) Weyerhaeuser (WY) has drawn fresh attention after recent trading left the stock around $24.48, with returns mixed, up about 4.0% over the past month but only slightly positive over the past three months. See our latest analysis for Weyerhaeuser. Zooming out, the share price has had a modest 2.9% year to date gain, while the 1 year total shareholder return is down 5.2%, pointing to muted momentum despite recent short term stability around...
